entity.name: Google DeepMind
entity.description: Alphabet's consolidated AI research and product arm (post-2023 merger of Google Brain and DeepMind). Operates Gemini models. Policy footprint spans antitrust (DOJ search remedies, ad-tech), EU AI Act compliance, and copyright litigation. Demis Hassabis is a frequent voice on frontier risk and international governance.

activity.title: Protecting People from Harmful Manipulation
activity.raw_text: As AI models get better at holding natural conversations, we must examine how these interactions affect people and society. Building on a breadth of scientific research, today, we are releasing new findings on the potential for AI to be misused for harmful manipulation*, specifically, its ability to alter human thought and behavior in negative and deceptive ways. With this latest study, we have created the first empirically validated toolkit to measure this kind of AI manipulation in the real world, which we hope will help protect people and advance the field as a whole.

_verify_phrases: first empirically validated toolkit to measure this kind of AI manipulation

activity.title: Gemini Deep Think: Redefining the Future of Scientific Research
activity.raw_text: Since achieving IMO Gold-medal standard in July 2025, Gemini Deep Think has progressed rapidly, scoring up to 90% on the IMO-ProofBench Advanced test as inference-time compute scales. We demonstrated that the scaling law continues to hold as we progress beyond Olympiad level into PhD-level exercises (per our internal FutureMath Basic benchmark). Notably, Aletheia demonstrated that higher reasoning quality can be achieved at a lower inference-time compute. The latest advanced version of Deep Think, as of Jan 2026, has significantly outperformed the IMO-Gold version (Jul 2025) on Olympiad-level problems.

_verify_phrases: Aletheia, a math research agent powered by Deep Think

activity.title: Google's 2026 Responsible AI Progress Report
activity.raw_text: 2025 marked a major shift for AI as it became a helpful, proactive partner, capable of reasoning and navigating the world. As models grow even more sophisticated, people and businesses around the globe are transitioning from exploration to integration and finding new ways to put these tools to work in their daily lives. The transformational potential of AI is coming more clearly into focus, from foundational advances in scientific discovery and clinical milestones in healthcare to the rise of agentic systems capable of dramatically boosting a person's productivity.

_verify_phrases: sharing our latest Responsible AI Progress Report

activity.title: Project Genie: AI world model now available for Ultra users in U.S.
activity.raw_text: Google AI Ultra subscribers in the U.S. can try out Project Genie, an experimental research prototype that lets you create and explore worlds. Project Genie is a research prototype that lets you create, explore and remix interactive worlds. You can use text prompts and images to build environments and navigate them in real time. While Google DeepMind has a history of agents for specific environments like Chess or Go, building AGI requires systems that navigate the diversity of the real world.

_verify_phrases: rolling out access to Project Genie for Google AI Ultra subscribers
